skills.name: AI Quick Chat
skills.description: Sends a short prompt to OpenRouter-compatible LLM for capability verification.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: CZ Style Rewrite
skills.description: Rewrites or generates a post in CZ-inspired style using dataset-derived profile cues.
skills.author: skillshub

inputExample.draft: 市场有波动，大家别慌，我们会持续优化产品和风控。

skills.name: Price Snapshot
skills.description: Fetches spot last price and 24h range for one trading pair.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Top Movers Radar
skills.description: Ranks top symbols by 24h change or quote volume with optional liquidity filter.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Orderbook Pulse
skills.description: Summarizes best bid/ask spread, top-level depth notional, and bid-vs-ask pressure for one spot pair.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Kline Brief
skills.description: Summarizes recent candles and short-term trend percentage.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Symbol Status
skills.description: Checks trading status, base/quote assets, and core filters for one symbol.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Funding Watch
skills.description: Reads funding rate, annualized estimate, and mark-index basis from Binance Futures.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Funding Basis Carry Scan
skills.description: Combines funding history and basis term structure to surface carry setups with risk labels.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Crowding Risk Scan
skills.description: Tracks long/short crowding from account ratios, taker flow, and OI change for squeeze warnings.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Liquidation Heatmap
skills.description: Aggregates recent force orders to estimate long-vs-short liquidation pressure.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: BSC Honeypot Check
skills.description: Checks sell restrictions, tax anomalies, and multi-DEX liquidity signals before buy-in.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Open Interest Scan
skills.description: Tracks futures open interest and taker flow changes for one symbol.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: BSC RPC Fanout Check
skills.description: Validates multi-endpoint RPC consistency, latency, and block drift for BSC.
skills.author: skillshub

skills.name: Dev Launch Streak Radar
skills.description: Onchain-first dev launch streak detection via Pancake PairCreated events, plus optional agent-configured API enrichment after credentials are set.
skills.author: skillshub
skills.installCommand: Use in your agent workflow (free default: public RPC + DexScreener).

openSourceCandidates.name: Market Data Module
openSourceCandidates.adaptation: Data read-only module for fast launch.

openSourceCandidates.name: TradingView MCP Server
openSourceCandidates.adaptation: Adapt as a read-only signal layer for multi-timeframe indicators, chart snapshots, and watchlist screening ahead of Binance trade decisions.
openSourceCandidates.researchNote: Web-researched candidate for the Binance signal lane.

openSourceCandidates.name: Binance MCP Server (Public Data)
openSourceCandidates.adaptation: Use as an external MCP bridge for public spot market data, then keep execution disabled and align tools with local price, kline, and orderbook skills.
openSourceCandidates.researchNote: Web-researched candidate for public Binance market data expansion.
